mapper.sql: id, student_no, student_name, student_phone, gender, password, education, grade_year, school, major, teaching_mode, class_id, student_tag, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into student ( student_no, student_name, student_phone, gender, password, education, grade_year, school, major, teaching_mode, class_id, student_tag, status, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{studentNo}, #{studentName}, #{studentPhone}, #{gender}, #{password}, #{education}, #{gradeYear}, #{school}, #{major}, #{teachingMode}, #{classId}, #{studentTag}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select from student where student_phone = #{studentPhone} limit 1

select from student where id in
#{id}
select from student where class_id = #{classId} order by id desc
select from student where teaching_mode = 'ONLINE' and status = 'ACTIVE' and student_tag is not null and student_tag != '' order by id asc
mapper.update: update student set class_id = #{classId}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update student set student_tag = #{studentTag}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
